title: reorganize views
excerpt: please make it possible to reorganize the order of the positions of the board views

posts.author: Tamir (Tamir Blajchman)
posts.cookedHtml: please make it possible to reorganize the order of the positions of the board views

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Tamir,

This feature is on their coming soon roadmap - Ability to Reorder Views - #3 by LeeL. Alpha version in the coming weeks and full release expected by the end of the year.
